final:
module RefModule (  
    input [3:0] A,  
    output reg [15:0] Y  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        Y = 16'b0; // Reset all outputs  
        Y[A] = 1'b1; // Activate the output corresponding to the input value  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
